title: astragalus eremophilus subsp. eremophilus
intro: Astragalus eremophilus subsp. eremophilus, also known as the desert milk-vetch, is a perennial legume native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus eremophilus subsp. eremophilus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions. Astragalus eremophilus subsp. eremophilus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
